title: metastelma brachymischum
intro: Metastelma brachymischum is a species of flowering plant in the dogbane family, Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Metastelma brachymischum include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. Metastelma brachymischum is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and can also be used in topical applications such as ointments and creams.
